backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Scrambly backend, wiring together authorization, user approval, blob storage, and profile/friends/ban-appeal logic with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state from an older schema to a newer one by adding empty `friendRequests` and `friends` maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (friends panel, friend requests, friend list, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, components, and data files added or modified for the friends and Knuckles features.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's design token system.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Scrambly React app, setting the page title and Sonic Mania-themed favicon/apple-touch-icon.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root router configuration using TanStack Router, defining all auth-gated and public routes including the new `/friends` route for FriendsModePage.
frontend/src/components/AccountLockedMes: Full-screen UI component shown when a user's account is locked, explaining the reason and providing a logout button.
A toggle UI component that enables or disables an ad blocker using the `useAdBlocker` hook, displaying a shield icon and status badge based on the current state.
frontend/src/components/AgeVerificationM: A modal form that collects a user's name and birth year, submits them for age verification, and handles outcomes including success, too young, too old, locked account, and invalid input.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: A wrapper component that guards child content behind authentication, redirecting to login, onboarding, account-locked, or usage-timer-lockout screens based on the user's state.
frontend/src/components/CameraCaptureSte: An onboarding step component that activates the device camera, captures a photo for liveness verification, immediately discards it without storing or transmitting, then signals completion.
frontend/src/components/CommunityFeed.ts: Fetches and renders a list of community posts with author, timestamp, and message, showing skeletons while loading and empty/error states as needed.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostFor: A form component that lets authenticated, non-locked users compose and submit community posts up to 500 characters, with loading and error feedback via toasts.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyCallBut: A pulsing SOS button that shows a confirmation dialog before initiating a `tel:911` call, guarding against accidental emergency calls.
frontend/src/components/ExternalSearchBu: Renders Google and DuckDuckGo search buttons for a given query; clicking either plays a Dr. Robotnik laugh sound and opens the external search URL in a new tab.
frontend/src/components/FriendListItem.t: Renders a single friend list entry by fetching the friend's profile via their Principal, showing initials avatar, display name, and an online indicator with a loading skeleton state.
frontend/src/components/FriendRequestIte: Displays an incoming friend request with the requester's profile info and accept/decline buttons, using the useRespondToFriendRequest mutation and showing toast notifications on result.
frontend/src/components/FriendsPanel.tsx: A slide-up/modal panel showing the user's friends list and pending friend requests, with a 1000-friend limit warning and scrollable sections for requests and friends.
frontend/src/components/KidModeWrapper.t: Utility component and helpers that determine if a user is in 'kid mode' (age ≤ 12) and conditionally renders children, kid-only content, or nothing based on that status.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout with a sticky header featuring a real-time clock, logo, navigation links (conditionally including admin/community based on role and kid mode), and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/OnboardingFlow.t: Two-step onboarding flow that first shows a camera face-check step and then an age verification modal, using sessionStorage to skip the camera step if already completed this session.
frontend/src/components/PINEntryModal.ts: Dialog modal for parental controls PIN entry and PIN change, storing the PIN in localStorage with a default of '1234' and validating input before granting access.
Full-screen ban notice shown when a user is banned from search, displaying the ban type/message, appeal status, an optional appeal redirect button, and a logout option.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input component with a submit button and clear (X) button, calling an `onSearch` callback on form submission or clear.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Renders a grid of Sonic knowledge or YouTube channel search results with type-specific icons and colors, plus loading skeletons and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/components/SearchWarningNot: A dismissible warning banner that displays the number of search warnings issued, remaining warnings before a ban, and a critical alert when one warning remains.
frontend/src/components/UsageTimerLockou: A full-screen lockout screen shown when a child's daily screen-time limit is reached, with a parental-controls message and a logout button.
frontend/src/data/knucklesContent.ts: Static data array of `SonicKnowledgeEntry` objects covering Knuckles-related characters, matchups, lore, and forms for use in search/display features.
frontend/src/data/knucklesVideos.ts: Static list of Knuckles-themed YouTube video entries with IDs, titles, category, and a `kidSafe` flag.
frontend/src/data/sonicAbilities.ts: Defines a single `SonicKnowledgeEntry` for Amy's Piko Piko Hammer ability and exports an array of search alias strings for matching related queries.
frontend/src/data/sonicBoomVideos.ts: Static dataset of Sonic Boom TV episode entries with YouTube IDs, season labels, and `kidFriendly` flags, covering both seasons of the show.
frontend/src/data/sonicCharacters.ts: Defines and exports an array of Sonic franchise character entries (e.g., Sonic, Shadow, Tails, Eggman) conforming to the SonicKnowledgeEntry type, each with a name, description, and highlights.
frontend/src/data/sonicItems.ts: Defines and exports a small array of Sonic franchise item entries (Chaos Emerald and Chili Dog) conforming to the SonicKnowledgeEntry type.
frontend/src/data/sonicLore.ts: Defines the SonicLoreEntry interface and exports an array of Sonic game lore entries from 1991 onward, each with year, key characters, and notable events.
frontend/src/data/sonicPrimeVideos.ts: Defines the VideoEntry interface and exports an array of Sonic Prime episode entries across three seasons, each with a YouTube ID and kid-friendly flag.
frontend/src/data/sonicSaysVideos.ts: Exports an array of 15 kid-friendly 'Sonic Says' PSA video entries, each with a title, YouTube ID, and category.
frontend/src/data/youtubeChannels.ts: Defines the YouTubeChannelEntry interface and exports a single YouTube channel entry for 'Teardropbfb' with its URL and aliases.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdBlocker.ts: Custom hook that manages an ad-blocker toggle state persisted in localStorage, defaulting to enabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor calls including profile management, community posts, moderation, friend requests, videos, ideas, and admin operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useRobotnikLaugh.ts: Custom hook that synthesizes a Dr. Robotnik-style villain laugh using the Web Audio API with sawtooth oscillators, requiring no external audio assets.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchModerator.ts: Custom hook that enforces client-side search query moderation with warning counts, ban logic for inappropriate terms, and appeal handling, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useUsageTimer.ts: Custom hook that counts down a user's remaining usage time in seconds from their profile, tracking expiry state and providing a time formatter.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind, defines a Sonic-themed CSS custom property palette (light/dark), and declares reusable component utility classes like sonic-card and sonic-btn-primary.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AgeMatcher.tsx: Page component that displays the current user's profile and allows admin users to search for other users born in the same year for age-matched friend discovery.
frontend/src/pages/AppealPage.tsx: A ban appeal page that lets users submit a text appeal (20–500 chars) to lift their ban, restricted to a specific allowed origin. Handles states for already-used appeals, no active ban, and successful submission with navigation back to home.
frontend/src/pages/BlockBlastGame.tsx: A Tetris-style block blast game rendered on an HTML canvas with keyboard controls, piece rotation, line clearing, and local high score persistence. Manages game state via refs and intervals for smooth drop mechanics.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Community hub page displaying a post form and feed for Sonic fans, with kid mode gating (13+), warning count display, and community guidelines. Links to a friend-matching feature.
frontend/src/pages/FriendsModePage.tsx: Friends Mode enrollment page where users submit a birthdate for age verification and set a display name; shows approval/denial status with toast notifications and a friends panel with pending request counts.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: Games lobby page listing available mini-games (Block Blast, Sonic Runner) as cards with thumbnails and play links, plus a button to open an external games site.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatchGame.tsx: A card memory-match game using Sonic-themed emoji symbols, tracking moves and elapsed time with a win state. Cards are shuffled on start and unmatched pairs flip back after a short delay.
frontend/src/pages/ModerationDashboard.t: Admin-only dashboard for moderating community posts, reviewing Friends Mode requests, and managing feature ideas, with actions to issue warnings, approve/deny requests, and mark ideas as reviewed.
frontend/src/pages/ParentalDashboard.tsx: PIN-protected parental controls page that allows parents or admins to set usage time limits for specific users or themselves via a slider and principal ID input.
frontend/src/pages/RingCollectorGame.tsx: Canvas-based mini-game where the player moves left/right to collect falling rings while avoiding obstacles, with score tracking and localStorage high score persistence.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: Search page that queries both local Sonic knowledge data and backend entries, supporting tabbed browsing by category (characters, games, lore, videos, YouTube channels) with kid-mode and search moderation support.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: User settings page covering profile info, PIN/password management, video uploads, ad-blocker toggle, and idea submission, with kid-mode awareness and Internet Identity integration.
frontend/src/pages/SonicDodgeGame.tsx: A canvas-based dodge game where the player moves a character to avoid colored obstacles that spawn from all sides and home in on the player, with increasing speed over time and a high score saved to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SonicJumpGame.tsx: A canvas-based platformer game where the player jumps between scrolling platforms using keyboard input, with a game-over condition on falling and a high score persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SonicRunnerGame.tsx: A Sonic-themed endless runner canvas game featuring a running character that jumps over obstacles and collects rings, with increasing speed, score tracking, and a high score saved to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/SonicTriviaGame.tsx: A Sonic the Hedgehog trivia quiz with 22 multiple-choice questions, tracking correct answers and displaying a final score summary with a restart option.
frontend/src/pages/SpinDashChallengeGame: A timing-based mini-game where the player holds a button to charge a meter and releases it within a randomized target zone across 8 rounds, with a high score saved to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/VideosPage.tsx: Displays a filterable video gallery of Sonic and Knuckles YouTube videos with kid-safe filtering based on user profile, supporting category tabs and an embedded YouTube player per card.
frontend/src/pages/WhackAChaoGame.tsx: A 30-second Whack-a-Mole style mini-game where players click randomly appearing Chao characters on a 3x3 grid, tracking score and a localStorage-persisted high score.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to strip sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom Sonic-themed colors, fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Persistent project state document (version 47) describing Scrambly's architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions for a Sonic-themed super app targeting users aged 10–18.
